title: FALSIFIED: ELM reservoir at m=5000 does NOT match elastic-net age MAE on GSE40279 5-fold CV

subject.display: FALSIFIED: ELM reservoir at m=5000 does NOT match elastic-net age MAE on GSE40279 5-fold CV
subject.prose: Migrated from v1.1 as a literal subject because the claim was marked withdrawn/falsified at migration time. Re-author with a typed subject when resuming.

structured.note: literal wrap chosen due to withdrawn/falsified status

context.free_form: migrated from v1.1 without domain-specific context

source.note: Hannum et al. 2013 whole-blood 450K methylation, n=656, ages 19-101. Streamed from GEO via rc05 scripts/07_stream_gse40279.py.

Union of probe coefficient vectors across 7 published methylation clocks (Horvath, Hannum, PhenoAge, GrimAge, DunedinPACE, Retro-Age v2, Retro-Age 450K), restricted to 450K-native probes. From rc01 results/clock_probes/.
Per-sample chronological age in years parsed from !Sample_characteristics_ch1.

operations.note: Restrict 450K beta matrix to clock-union probes (n approx 3221). The 'in' RHS is a placeholder list resolved by evaluate.py from p_clock_union_probes.

statistics.name: mae_years_5fold_cv
statistics.note: Tuned ElasticNetCV MAE on GSE40279, 5-fold random CV. Pinned to STAGE2_FINDINGS.md headline number.

statistics.name: mae_years_5fold_cv
statistics.note: ELM at m=5000, median across 3 reservoir seeds, 5-fold random CV. Pinned to STAGE2_FINDINGS.md headline number; this is what falsifies P1.

statistics.name: delta_mae_elm_minus_elastic_net
statistics.note: Derived: s_elm_mae_m5000 - s_elastic_net_mae. Positive delta means ELM is WORSE; pre-registered P1 expected delta <= 0.

inference.justification: Pre-registered P1 (rc05 DESIGN.md): ELM at m >= 5000 achieves age MAE less-than-or-equal to elastic-net baseline on 5-fold CV. The single-conjunct test is exactly the 'reservoir reaches the predictor frontier' claim. If this fails, the random-projection reservoir is not rich enough on its own to displace tuned elastic net; learned encoders (Option C) would be needed.
inference.failure_mode: Falsified iff s_elm_mae_m5000 > s_elastic_net_mae. Observed: s_delta_mae = +2.5 yrs. Falsifier triggered. Recorded as the pivot that motivated the rc06 reframe (compute amortization, not accuracy parity, as the honest RC affordance).

conclusion.assertion: On GSE40279 (Hannum 2013) whole-blood 450K methylation, an untrained ELM reservoir at m=5000 with tanh activation and ridge readout produces 5-fold CV chronological-age MAE of approximately 7.2 years, materially worse than tuned elastic net (~4.7 years). The pre-registered claim that ELM matches or beats elastic net at this width is FALSIFIED.

scope.scale_note: Falsification is at m=5000 specifically. Larger m (50K+) was tested in Stage 2 and did not close the gap; the falsification is robust across the swept m range. Other architectures (learned encoder, multi-output amortization) are out of scope for this claim object — they live as separate RC06 Aim 3 claims.

confidence.note: Per-fold MAE SDs reported in STAGE2_FINDINGS.md; not pinned in this fixture pending evaluate.py.

external_assumptions.statement: GSE40279 is the canonical methylation-age benchmark; an architecture that fails to match elastic net here will not generalize to other cohorts as a competitor predictor.
Clock-union probe restriction (~3221 probes) is the same feature space the elastic net baseline uses; the comparison is fair.

An untrained random projection at m=5000 with the chosen ELM defaults (tanh, Gaussian W_in, uniform bias) is a defensible 'standard ELM' configuration; pathological tuning could improve numbers but would not change the qualitative gap.
